text.title: Design Patterns Overview Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the decision-record artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-patterns-overview.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: adr_id pattern violation; symptom too short; chosen_pattern too short; rejected < 2 entries; cost_score / fit_score out of [1,5]; review_trigger empty; version / date malformed.
